articles.description: With just two out of six Premier League teams progressing to the Champions League quarter-finals, what went wrong for the English sides?

articles.description: Despite a difficult domestic campaign, Liverpool produce one of their best displays of the season against Galatasaray in the Champions League.

articles.description: After Lionel Messi scored his 900th career goal on Wednesday, BBC Sport looks at the numbers behind the "insane" achievement.
articles.title: Lionel Messi: Argentine hits 900 career goals - numbers behind the milestone

articles.description: Tottenham can take encouragement in their battle for Premier League survival despite a Champions League exit, writes Phil McNulty.
articles.title: Tottenham 3-2 Atletico Madrid: Igor Tudor's side must now focus on Premier League survival

articles.title: Barcelona 7-2 Newcastle: What next for Eddie Howe's side?

articles.description: Senegal say "we will stop at nothing" in their fight to overturn the decision to strip them of the Africa Cup of Nations title.
articles.title: Afcon 2025: Senegal say 'fight is far from over' after Morocco awarded title

articles.description: Rory McIlroy will use one of his mother's favourite dishes among appetisers that also include elk when he hosts the traditional champion's dinner at the Masters.
articles.title: Rory McIlroy: Masters champion's dinner to feature elk and one of his mother's dishes

articles.description: West Ham hold Manchester United to a draw which deals a significant blow to their hopes of challenging leaders Manchester City.

articles.title: Milano-Torino 2026: Tom Pidcock wins on debut in world's oldest classic
